title: scorzoneroides × lannesii
intro: Scorzoneroides × lannesii, also known as lymes' crown daisy, is a hybrid plant belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and edible leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as fever, arthritis, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides × lannesii include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
